titleStmt.title: SII 25.223: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 223. (A.R. No. 223 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Inner gōpura of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This record furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 17, Tulā śu 14, Friday and Aśvati-nakshatra corresponding to 1262 A.D., October 27.

It registers a gift of lands (araikkāl-nilam) and 60 kuḻi of raised land (tiḍar-nilam) to the south of the above lands by the tāṉattār of Uśāttānattuttānam to the āṇḍār for rearing a flower garden named Tirukkāḷatti-uḍaiyārtiruṉandavaṉam, raised by Adichcha[dēvar] of Vēḷūr. The āṇḍār were enjoined to supply garland of flowers (tiruppaḷittāmañ-chātti) to the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār, for which they were to receive 60 kalam of paddy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājentra coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu
10 7 vatu tulā nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturdaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyanāṟkku tirup
paḷittāmañcātti Aruḷa veḷuḻān Āticcatevar caivikkiṟa tirukkāḷatti
uṭaiyār tiruṉantavaṉanceykiṟa Aṇṭār Icaikkavum certta
patiṉkala Araipolicaiyāl nellu Aṟupatiṉkalam Āka nellu Aṟupatiṉ kalamum
vucāttānattut tānattom It tiruṉantavanaṅ caikiṟa Āṇṭārkku civaṉattukku Iṭṭa
Araikkālum Iṉnilattukku teṟkkil vāykkālu teṟkkil tiṭarnilam kuḻi Aṟupatu Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
